name: Frost Brand
description:
The blade of this +2 greater striking greatsword appears to be nothing but icy shards. The frost brand automatically extinguishes non-magical fires in a . While wielding it, you gain fire resistance 5.

Activate 2 command, Interact

Effect You swing the frost brand into the area of an ongoing magical fire, and the blade attempts to counteract the fire with a counteract modifier of [[/r 1d20+27 #Counteract]]{+27}. If it fails, it can't attempt to counteract the same fire again.
